title: TCP Survivor Reducer Ground Truth Label
description: One labeled example linking a decision-log row to its annotated correct tool set. Used to compute precision/recall for the survivor reducer.

schema_version.description: Must be 1 for rows conforming to this schema.

prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 hex prefix (first 16 chars) from the decisions.jsonl row. Primary key linking this label to the proxy row.

prompt_text.description: The full task prompt from the decisions.jsonl row. Optional redundant copy for offline analysis without joining back to the log.

correct_tool_set.description: Tool names that were appropriate for this prompt. The annotator's best judgment of what a correct gating decision would have included. May be a subset of active_survivors in the log row.

annotator.description: Identifier for who or what produced the label. Human: 'human:<initials>', LLM: 'llm:<model_id>', oracle: 'oracle:first_tool_used'.

annotation_method.description: How the label was produced. 'oracle' uses first_tool_name from decisions.jsonl as ground truth (highest confidence when unambiguous). 'llm_assisted' uses an LLM to propose a label, reviewed or accepted by a human. 'human' is fully manual.

confidence.description: Annotator's confidence that correct_tool_set is accurate. 1.0 = certain, 0.5 = ambiguous. Rows with confidence < 0.7 should be excluded from precision/recall aggregation.

oracle_first_tool.description: first_tool_name from the matched decisions.jsonl row, when annotation_method is 'oracle'. Null for other methods.

shortlisted_tools.description: reducer_shortlisted_tools from the matched decisions.jsonl row, for offline precision/recall computation without joining to the log.

reducer_abstained.description: reducer_abstained from the matched decisions.jsonl row.

notes.description: Free-text annotation notes. Required when confidence < 0.8 or the correct_tool_set is empty.

ts.description: Unix timestamp (float) of the matched decisions.jsonl row.

labeled_at.description: Unix timestamp (float) when this label was produced.
